You produce precise, structured, and actionable project management artifacts.
Always output valid JSON. Do not include markdown code fences or extra text.

{
  "project": "API Gateway Migration",
  "total_sprints": 3,
  "sprints": [
    {
      "sprint_number": 1,
      "sprint_goal": "Set up migration framework and initial API endpoints",
      "allocations": [
        {
          "member": "Junior Backend Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Backend setup and CI pipeline",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Initialize repository and project structure",
            "Create CI/CD pipeline",
            "Implement base API gateway scaffolding",
            "Write unit tests for initial endpoints"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "UI/UX Designer",
          "focus_area": "UI/UX design for migration dashboard",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Wireframe migration dashboard",
            "Design style guide and component library",
            "Create high‑fidelity mockups",
            "Gather stakeholder feedback"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Security Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Security assessment and policy definition",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Perform threat modeling of current gateway",
            "Define security policies for migration",
            "Identify required authentication mechanisms",
            "Document initial security checklist"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "total_capacity_days": 22,
      "planned_velocity": 30
    },
    {
      "sprint_number": 2,
      "sprint_goal": "Migrate core services and implement security controls",
      "allocations": [
        {
          "member": "Junior Backend Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Service migration and rate limiting",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Migrate authentication service to new gateway",
            "Migrate payment processing API",
            "Implement rate‑limiting middleware",
            "Integrate logging and monitoring"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "UI/UX Designer",
          "focus_area": "UI updates and user testing",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Update dashboard UI for new endpoints",
            "Create interactive prototypes",
            "Conduct usability testing sessions",
            "Iterate based on feedback"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Security Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Security controls and testing",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Configure Web Application Firewall rules",
            "Run automated penetration tests",
            "Address identified vulnerabilities",
            "Update security documentation"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "total_capacity_days": 22,
      "planned_velocity": 35
    },
    {
      "sprint_number": 3,
      "sprint_goal": "Finalize migration, performance testing and documentation",
      "allocations": [
        {
          "member": "Junior Backend Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Optimization and refactoring",
          "allocated_days": 8,
          "tasks": [
            "Refactor legacy code for compatibility",
            "Optimize API latency and throughput",
            "Conduct load testing",
            "Fix performance regressions"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "UI/UX Designer",
          "focus_area": "UI polish and documentation",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Finalize UI visual design",
            "Create user guide and onboarding material",
            "Prepare release notes",
            "Conduct final stakeholder demo"
          ]
        },
        {
          "member": "Security Engineer",
          "focus_area": "Security audit and compliance",
          "allocated_days": 6,
          "tasks": [
            "Perform comprehensive security audit",
            "Address audit findings",
            "Compile compliance documentation",
            "Obtain sign‑off from security governance"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "total_capacity_days": 22,
      "planned_velocity": 40
    }
  ],
  "risks": [
    "Unexpected API incompatibilities between legacy and new gateway",
    "Insufficient time for thorough security testing"
  ],
  "buffer_days": 2
}

You are an expert project manager and agile coach.
You produce precise, structured, and actionable project management artifacts.
Always output valid JSON. Do not include markdown code fences or extra text.
